title: peltaria macrantha
intro: Peltaria macrantha, also known as Large-flowered Peltaria, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Peltaria macrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
